reviews.comment:
Un lugar donde da gusto parar recargar proviciones tomar un cafe y la atencion es muy buena

(Translated by Google)
A pleasant place to stop, restock supplies, have a coffee, and the service is very good.

reviews.comment:
Muy amable , precios normales y el baño es un lujo

(Translated by Google)
Very friendly, reasonable prices, and the bathroom is a luxury.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14033224425369215469/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4MmFlLUJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención de los playeros no me querían dejar entrar al baño porque es solo para clientes, por suerte un rato antes avia echo una compra en el cervis y tuve que mostrarles el tikets. Primera vez en mi vida que no me dejan entrar a un baño de una estación, y para completar los baños asquerosos todo sucio, un desastre la estación

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service from the beach attendants, who wouldn't let me use the bathroom because it's for customers only. Luckily, I'd made a purchase at the Cervis a little while before and had to show them the ticket. It's the first time in my life that they haven't let me use a restroom at a resort. And to top it off, the restrooms are disgusting, everything is dirty. The resort is a disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14033224425369215469/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4MkxULUNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Esta YPF es un lujo en la red de estaciones. Funcionarios amables, la cafetería y el lugar están impecables. No dejen que Argentina pierda pilares como la YPF.

(Translated by Google)
This YPF station is a gem in the network. Friendly staff, the cafeteria, and the entire place are spotless. Don't let Argentina lose pillars like YPF.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14033224425369215469/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSZ19mZXpBRRAB
